records.question: Which departments located in the Chandler building have a budget at most 255041.46 and include a student named Okaf?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Okaf' AND department.building = 'Chandler' AND department.budget <= 255041.46
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
WHERE d.building = 'Chandler'
  AND d.budget <= 255041.46
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM student s
    WHERE s.dept_name = d.dept_name
      AND s.name = 'Okaf'
  )

records.question: What departments located in the Mercer building have a budget of at least 794541.46, offer the course titled Finite Element Analysis, and have an instructor named Pimenta earning at most 79866.95 with students having no more than 109 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE course.title = 'Finite Element Analysis' AND instructor.salary <= 79866.95 AND student.tot_cred <= 109 AND department.building = 'Mercer' AND instructor.name = 'Pimenta' AND department.budget >= 794541.46
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
WHERE d.building = 'Mercer'
  AND d.budget >= 794541.46
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM course c
    WHERE c.dept_name = d.dept_name
      AND c.title = 'Finite Element Analysis'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM instructor i
    WHERE i.dept_name = d.dept_name
      AND i.name = 'Pimenta'
      AND i.salary <= 79866.95
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM student s
    WHERE s.dept_name = d.dept_name
      AND s.tot_cred <= 109
  )

records.question: Which departments are located in the Saucon building and have an instructor named Lembr teaching the 4-credit course titled Quantum Mechanics, with students having at most 113 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE instructor.name = 'Lembr' AND course.credits = 4 AND course.title = 'Quantum Mechanics' AND department.building = 'Saucon' AND student.tot_cred <= 113
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.dept_name
FROM department d
WHERE d.building = 'Saucon'
AND d.dept_name IN (
  SELECT i.dept_name
  FROM instructor i
  WHERE i.name = 'Lembr'
)
AND d.dept_name IN (
  SELECT c.dept_name
  FROM course c
  WHERE c.title = 'Quantum Mechanics'
  AND c.credits = 4
)
AND d.dept_name IN (
  SELECT s.dept_name
  FROM student s
  JOIN takes t ON s.ID = t.ID
  JOIN section sec ON t.course_id = sec.course_id
    AND t.sec_id = sec.sec_id
    AND t.semester = sec.semester
    AND t.year = sec.year
  JOIN course c ON sec.course_id = c.course_id
  JOIN teaches te ON sec.course_id = te.course_id
    AND sec.sec_id = te.sec_id
    AND sec.semester = te.semester
    AND sec.year = te.year
  JOIN instructor i ON te.ID = i.ID
  WHERE c.title = 'Quantum Mechanics'
  AND c.credits = 4
  AND i.name = 'Lembr'
  AND s.tot_cred <= 113
)
